base.prompt: A photographic, candid, head-and-shoulders portrait of a fictional man in their sixties, of mixed heritage, with long curly hair and amber eyes, a soft smile. warm afternoon sunlight. a softly lit gray studio backdrop. Realistic skin texture, natural pores, no makeup, no glasses, no jewelry, no text, no watermark, sharp focus on the face. This is a fictional character — do not generate a real or named person.

lookalikes.prompt: A full-body candid photograph of a male-presenting individual in their 50s with warm olive skin, walking through an autumn park with leaves on the ground. He has a squarer face shape with high cheekbones and a slightly shorter face length than average. Visible fine lines around the eyes and forehead. His dark brown hair, with significant graying throughout, is loosely wavy and reaches his shoulders. His eyes are downturned ovals, a rich hazel color, and set closer together. His thick, dark eyebrows are mostly straight with a slight arch at the ends, also showing some gray. His nose has a slightly Roman bridge and a squared-off tip. He has thinner lips, with a neatly trimmed gray beard and mustache covering his chin and upper lip. He has a thoughtful, relaxed expression, looking forward as he walks. Photographic, sharp focus, realistic skin texture.
